name: AquaDeep
description: AquaDeep est spécialisée dans le développement de solutions technologique basé sur l'IA, ayant pour but d'optimiser et rentabiliser la production des fermes aquacoles dès les premières étapes du cycle de développement des espèces aquatiques destinées à la consommation de masse.
tagline: Boost productivity and sustainability in aquaculture

products.name: Oxygen
products.description: Advanced artificial intelligence technology that automates larvae counting with unprecedented accuracy, eliminating manual counting errors and providing instant digital results for modern aquaculture operations. AquaDeep's SaaS platform Oxygen uses advanced AI to automate larvae counting from simple hatchery images, instantly providing precise counts and digital records, saving hours and boosting productivity in a secure, easy-to-use online system.

###### AquaDeep
#  Aboutus
Innovation
##### AI-Powered Digital Counting
Advanced artificial intelligence technology that automates larvae counting with unprecedented accuracy, eliminating manual counting errors and providing instant digital results for modern aquaculture operations.
##### Automated Efficiency
Streamline daily hatchery management with automated counting processes that reduce errors, optimize resource allocation, and make operations faster, easier, and more reliable than ever before.
##### Sustainable Productivity
Boost productivity and sustainability in aquaculture with state-of-the-art technology designed specifically for modern hatcheries, helping you achieve better results while minimizing environmental impact.
[Learn More](https://www.aquadeep.ai/about-us)
